limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No aggregate AI-specific capex dollar amounts or multi-year budget commitments disclosed in excerpts; the $98M icometrix acquisition is the only quantified AI-related spend, limiting score to 3 rather than 4/5 as it is a single acquisition rather than a disclosed AI capex program.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named deployed use cases described with operational detail (AI-guided ultrasound, brain imaging analysis, radiation oncology AI) but no quantified business results (e.g., % productivity improvement, volume handled) found in excerpts, capping score at 4.
